result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy the default language of humanity—so that everyone instinctively sees through each other’s eyes, feels each other’s struggles, and builds decisions on genuine compassion rather than fear or competition.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy the default language of humanity—so that everyone instinctively sees through each other’s eyes, feels each other’s struggles, and builds decisions on genuine compassion rather than fear or competition.
